extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ attacked on the descent after Tourmalet, gained 19 seconds on THOMAS through daredevil descending, and moved into third overall ahead of FROOME.
tactical_patterns: LANDA's long-range Tourmalet attack temporarily put him virtually second overall, forcing KRUIJSWIJK domestique work.
ROGLIČ positioned directly behind DUMOULIN's attacks, then countered on descent when Dutchman had exhausted himself.
Movistar three-pronged strategy failed when VALVERDE and QUINTANA both dropped before LANDA could consolidate gains.
THOMAS never initiated, only reacted to every attack with closed mouth, revealing confidence-based defensive strategy.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: descending superiority plus LottoNL-Jumbo strength nearly matched Sky, now hunting DUMOULIN's second place only 19 seconds back
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: solo Tourmalet attack gained 3+ minutes before being reeled, capable of ambitious long-range moves
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: responded effortlessly to all attacks with mouth closed, complete control suggests deeper reserves than rivals
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: suffered compared to THOMAS, lost podium spot to teammate ROGLIČ, appears weaker than 2017 form
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: attacked multiple times but unable to distance ROGLIČ, then couldn't follow on descent despite maximum effort
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: dropped from fifth to out of top-five, previous day's crash injury clearly compromising climbing ability
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: dropped early on final climb, preventing Movistar from numerical advantage when LANDA attacked
rider_signals.KRUIJSWIJK Steven: positive: big acceleration on descent took huge chunk from LANDA's advantage, key domestique work
rider_signals.AMADOR Andrey: positive: breakaway positioning allowed him to assist LANDA when they merged, intelligent team placement
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: clinched polka dots with 79-point margin, quick enough to win intermediate sprints for KOM points
rider_signals.LATOUR Pierre: positive: survived 50km solo time trial after being dropped early, retained white jersey through solid time-trialing
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: domestique work for Sky while 21 years old, identified as future yellow jersey contender
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: neutral: finished in group 19 seconds back, solid but not exceptional performance
